'''Vo Lantes''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agent tasked with acquiring supplies. He was part of the network set up by logistics agent [[Redda Macrebe]]. He owned and operated a chain of used [[Droid/Legends|droid]] lots along the [[Trax Tube/Legends|Trax Tube]]. This allowed him to provide specially modified droids and [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]] to Rebel cells along the trade route. Vo Lantes's primary headquarters was on [[Deysum III]].<ref name="Cracken's Rebel Operatives" />
